title: The 'hotspot' sensor of Nvidia RTX 50 GPUs remains accessible through the internal MODS tool
summary: It was detected that the RTX 5070 Ti can throttle its performance at 107 °C due to poor thermal paste application in some assemblies.

title: AMD reduces the price of the RX 9070 GRE below $500 to revitalize 1440p gaming
summary: AMD's mid-range graphics card drops 9% from its initial price just a month after launch to compete with Nvidia's offerings.

title: Apple sues OpenAI for misappropriation of trade secrets after engineer's 'Lol, I have access' message
summary: The lawsuit alleges that OpenAI used stolen technology from Apple's labs to develop its language models.

title: OpenAI claims its new GPT-5.6 Sol Ultra model has solved a mathematical problem unsolved for 50 years in under an hour
summary: The milestone, if confirmed, would represent a major advance in the reasoning capability of generative artificial intelligence.

title: Report reveals that terrorist groups use all major AI chatbots to plan attacks and develop weapons
summary: A recent security analysis warns about terrorist organizations' access to generative artificial intelligence for operational purposes.

title: Microsoft loses lawsuit in Brazil for refusing to restore a hacked Xbox user's account and must compensate him
summary: A Brazilian court ordered Microsoft to restore a user's game library and pay $400 for forcing him to repurchase his games.

title: John Deere loses control over the repair of its agricultural machinery and will be under judicial oversight for a decade
summary: The manufacturer must allow independent repairs and provide diagnostic tools after a historic agreement with regulators.

title: Malware campaign with fake DNS scanners infects more than 200 repositories on GitHub via Go packages
summary: The 'Muck and Load' operation has published more than 700 malicious modules since January, spreading an infostealer among developers.

title: Martha Lillard, the last US polio patient who depended on an iron lung, dies at 78 in Oklahoma
summary: Lillard was one of the last people in the United States to live with an iron lung, a symbol of the fight against polio before the vaccine.

title: China reaches asteroid that had baffled scientists for a decade and its first photograph already provides new clues
summary: The Chinese mission has reached a rare asteroid and the first images are changing the understanding of its composition and origin.

title: Meta launches Muse Spark 1.1, an AI model that surpasses GLM-5.2 in programming tasks at a lower cost
summary: The battle for supremacy in code AI intensifies with this new Meta model offering competitive performance at a lower price.

title: China presents 'Orca', a world model that matches specialized robotic systems without needing to see a single action label
summary: The system learns by observation and equals systems with years of supervised training, a major advance for generalist robotics.

title: SK Hynix forecasts that 2027 will be the 'worst year' of memory shortage, with effects that could extend until 2030
summary: The South Korean semiconductor manufacturer warns of a prolonged crisis in the supply of DRAM and NAND memory chips.

title: Analysis uncovers the virtuous funding circle between Nvidia, CoreWeave and Nebius that drives the GPU boom
summary: The analysis details how the financial interconnection between these companies is fueling the explosive growth of AI infrastructure.

title: AI agents prevail in Slay the Spire 2 thanks to a new structured memory system
summary: Researchers achieved AI surpassing human players by replacing messy chat logs with a hierarchical memory system.

title: China reactivates coal after a decade of slowdown with renewables to sustain its industrial and energy growth
summary: The increase in energy demand, driven by the technology industry, forces China to burn coal again on a large scale.

title: Microsoft struggles to meet its 2030 sustainability commitment amid the unstoppable growth of its AI infrastructure
summary: The company assures that the goal remains feasible despite the enormous energy consumption of data centers dedicated to artificial intelligence.

title: The 'Colibrì' model demonstrates that it is possible to run a 1.5 TB frontier-level AI in just 25 GB of RAM
summary: A new compression technique allows running massive artificial intelligence models on consumer hardware efficiently.

title: Popular npm security package Jscrambler 8.14.0 is compromised and installs an information stealer during installation
summary: The software supply chain attack affects developers who installed this version of the JavaScript security package.

title: Xbox could launch its physical-to-digital game conversion system 'Positron' for Insiders next week
summary: The feature would allow registering game discs to the digital account, eliminating the need for physical media to play.
